headlines.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine, Dnipro hit hardest
headlines.summary: Russian drone and missile strikes on the Ukrainian city of Dnipro killed at least seven people. Four died in a strike on a residential building. Over 20 wounded including a nine-year-old child and two police officers.

headlines.title: Trump dispatches Witkoff and Kushner to Pakistan for Iran peace talks
headlines.summary: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner traveled to Pakistan for new talks with Iran's foreign minister. Trump extended a three-week ceasefire to allow more time for negotiations.

headlines.title: NATO says 'no provision' to expel members after report US could seek to suspend Spain
headlines.summary: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish NATO allies over perceived lack of support for Iran war. NATO officials push back at reported US threat to Spain.

headlines.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch coordinated attacks across Mali
headlines.summary: Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north of Mali in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

headlines.title: Altman apologizes after OpenAI failed to alert police before Tumbler Ridge killings
headlines.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman apologized after the company failed to alert authorities before killings in Tumbler Ridge.

headlines.title: Thousands at risk after multi-million dollar Everest flood warning system left to rust
headlines.summary: The flood warning system at Imja glacial lake has not been maintained since 2016, fearful locals tell BBC.

headlines.title: US soldier charged with using classified intel to win $400K on Maduro raid betting
headlines.summary: A US soldier was charged with using classified intelligence to win $400,000 betting on the Maduro raid outcome on Polymarket.

headlines.title: Palestinians in West Bank and some in Gaza vote in local elections
headlines.summary: Local elections held in the occupied West Bank and one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.

headlines.title: China car giant BYD says it can thrive without US market
headlines.summary: China's BYD says it is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels as fuel prices rise.

headlines.title: US military seizes tanker associated with Iranian oil smuggling in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: The US military seized another tanker associated with smuggling Iranian oil, ratcheting up tensions a day after Iran's Revolutionary Guards took control of two vessels.
